lines: United Kingdom versus France. Who wins?
Population. France leads with 68 million people. The UK has 67 million. Extremely close.
GDP. The UK edges ahead at 3.3 trillion dollars. France has 3.1 trillion.
Land Area. France is larger at 640 thousand square kilometers. The UK has 243 thousand.
Military Personnel. France has 205 thousand active. The UK has 150 thousand.
Nuclear Warheads. France leads with 290 warheads. The UK has 225.
Olympic Gold Medals. The UK leads with 285 golds. France has 259.
Tourism. France is the most visited country on Earth. 90 million tourists per year. The UK gets 40 million.
Nobel Prizes. The UK dominates with 138 Nobel laureates. France has 73.
The final score. Four all. It's a tie!

seo.title: UK vs France — Who ACTUALLY Wins? 🇬🇧🇫🇷
